parameters.criterion: at least 8 affected links have non-spine bbox area ratio below 0.98
parameters.name: global_shell_scale

parameters.criterion: WAIST_YAW low and IMU_ORIGIN high waist sections show at least 5% median area reduction
parameters.name: torso_waist_cinch_depth

parameters.criterion: generated fembot MJCF reduces left/right hip-pitch body spacing below 0.98x and compiles in MuJoCo
parameters.name: hip_spacing_scale

parameters.criterion: median upper-thigh non-spine bbox area ratio is above 1.05
parameters.name: upper_thigh_hip_flare

parameters.criterion: WAIST_YAW high torso/bust band pushes front +X outward by more than 10 mm
parameters.name: bust_front_gain

parameters.criterion: WAIST_YAW mid torso center shifts back -X by more than 8 mm
parameters.name: back_arch_shift_m

parameters.criterion: mid-calf back -X envelope expands by more than 5 mm
parameters.name: calf_back_bulge

parameters.criterion: median arm-link non-spine bbox area ratio is below 0.94
parameters.name: arm_slim_taper
